gpu: AMD Custom GPU 0932 (radeonsi, vangogh, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.59, 6.11.11-valve29-1-neptune-611-g2dcfaf4df7ac)
notes: I have played Titanfall 2 on Steam Deck just fine until I tried to play again today, and then the game wouldn't even start. After trying everything from verifying the file integrity, tinkering with Proton options, uninstalling and reinstalling, and even installing to a different drive, none of it fixed the issue. I added "-windowed" to launch options and that finally got it to launch. But now it runs like crap. Used to get a solid 45 FPS and now I get less than 20 FPS in the menu. What's even stranger is that Steam overlay shows my CPU is only at 20% usage and GPU is at 10% usage. I have tried changing every setting in the game's video options, as well as the framerate limit in SteamOS, and tinkered with Proton again, and the framerate still won't go above 20 FPS in the menu. Trying to continue the campaign results in a frozen screen. EA says they "don't offer direct support for this game anymore." I just want whoever broke it to fix it so I can at least finish the campaign.
title: Titanfall 2
